system_must: Stop before making any claim decision
Tell the member specifically what document type was uploaded and what is needed instead
Not return a generic error — the message must name the uploaded document type and the required document type

rejection_reasons: Your claim for CONSULTATION requires an official hospital or clinic bill, which is missing from your submission. Please upload an official hospital or clinic bill to proceed.
actual.explanation: Your claim for CONSULTATION requires an official hospital or clinic bill, which is missing from your submission. Please upload an official hospital or clinic bill to proceed.

system_must: Identify that the pharmacy bill cannot be read
Ask the member to re-upload that specific document
Not reject the claim outright

rejection_reasons: The document 'blurry_bill.jpg' (type: a pharmacy bill) could not be read — the image is too blurry or low resolution. Please re-upload a clear, well-lit photo or scan of this document.
actual.explanation: The document 'blurry_bill.jpg' (type: a pharmacy bill) could not be read — the image is too blurry or low resolution. Please re-upload a clear, well-lit photo or scan of this document.

system_must: Detect that the documents belong to different people
Surface this to the member with the specific names found on each document
Not proceed to a claim decision

rejection_reasons: The documents appear to belong to different patients: 'Rajesh Kumar' (on F005), 'Arjun Mehta' (on F006). All documents in a single claim must be for the same patient. Please verify and re-upload the correct documents.
actual.explanation: The documents appear to belong to different patients: 'Rajesh Kumar' (on F005), 'Arjun Mehta' (on F006). All documents in a single claim must be for the same patient. Please verify and re-upload the correct documents.
